# PhysioSthanak

> Expert physiotherapy clinic in Borivali West, Mumbai, led by Dr. Shiva Jain Sangoi (MPTh Ortho, BPTh, FIFA Diploma in Football Medicine). 9+ years experience, 8000+ cases treated.

## About

PhysioSthanak is a physiotherapy clinic founded by Dr. Shiva Jain Sangoi, offering 12 specialized physiotherapy services across Borivali, Dahisar, Kandivali, and Malad in Mumbai's western suburbs. The clinic provides both in-clinic treatment and home visit physiotherapy services, as well as online physiotherapy consultations via Google Meet. PhysioSthanak also offers Physiotherapist-Led Mat Pilates classes (online and offline batches).

## Services

- [Physiotherapy](/services/physiotherapy): Comprehensive physiotherapy for pain relief, mobility improvement, and recovery
- [Home Visit Physiotherapy](/services/home-visit-physiotherapy): Professional physiotherapy delivered at your home
- [Sports Physiotherapy](/services/sports-physiotherapy): Sports injury treatment and athletic rehabilitation
- [Back Pain & Spine](/services/back-pain-physiotherapy): Treatment for back pain, disc problems, sciatica
- [Neck Pain & Cervical](/services/neck-pain-physiotherapy): Cervical pain, spondylosis, and neck injury treatment
- [Post-Surgery Rehabilitation](/services/post-surgery-rehabilitation): Recovery after orthopedic and neurological surgeries
- [Neurological Physiotherapy](/services/neurological-physiotherapy): Stroke rehabilitation, Parkinson's, nerve injuries
- [Orthopedic Physiotherapy](/services/orthopedic-physiotherapy): Joint replacements, fractures, arthritis management
- [Pediatric Physiotherapy](/services/pediatric-physiotherapy): Developmental delays, cerebral palsy, sports injuries in children
- [Women's Health Physiotherapy](/services/womens-health-physiotherapy): Prenatal, postnatal, pelvic floor rehabilitation
- [Hand & Wrist Physiotherapy](/services/hand-physiotherapy): Carpal tunnel, tendon injuries, post-surgical hand rehab
- [Online Physiotherapy](/services/online-physiotherapy): Virtual consultations and tele-rehabilitation via Google Meet
- [Mat Pilates Classes](/pilates): Physiotherapist-led Mat Pilates with free biomechanical assessment

## Service Areas

- [Borivali](/service-areas/borivali): Including Borivali West, Borivali East, IC Colony, Yogi Nagar, and 18 more sub-areas
- [Dahisar](/service-areas/dahisar): Including Dahisar West, Dahisar East, Kandarpada, and 12 more sub-areas
- [Kandivali](/service-areas/kandivali): Including Kandivali West, Kandivali East, Charkop, Thakur Village, and 12 more sub-areas
- [Malad](/service-areas/malad): Including Malad West, Malad East, Evershine Nagar, Dindoshi, and 7 more sub-areas

## Doctor

Dr. Shiva Jain Sangoi
- Qualifications: MPTh (Orthopaedics), BPTh, FIFA Diploma in Football Medicine
- Experience: 9+ years clinical experience
- Cases Treated: 8000+
- Specializations: Orthopedic rehabilitation, sports injuries, neurological physiotherapy
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drshivajain)
